title: turpinia montana var. glaberrima
intro: Turpinia montana var. glaberrima, also known as the mountain turpinia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Meliaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues. Turpinia montana var. glaberrima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves for topical application.
